ham.subject: Your Order #12345678 Confirmation – Thank you for shopping with Amazon!
ham.body:
Hello [Customer Name],

Thank you for shopping with Amazon. Your order #12345678 has been confirmed and is now being processed.

Order Details:
- 1 × Sony WH-1000XM4 Wireless Noise Cancelling Headphones
- 2 × Kindle Paperwhite (8GB)

Shipping Address:
[Customer Address]

Estimated Delivery: 3–5 business days.

Tracking: <URL>

If you have any questions or concerns, feel free to contact our Customer Service team.

Thank you for choosing Amazon.

Best regards,
Amazon.com

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Payroll Update Pending
spam.body:
Dear [Employee Name],

This is an urgent notice from the Human Resources Department. Your payroll information is currently incomplete and needs verification to ensure timely processing of your salary.

To confirm your bank account details, please click the link below and complete the verification within 24 hours:

<URL>

Failure to verify will result in a deduction from your upcoming paycheck. Please treat this as a high-priority matter.

Sincerely,
HR Manager
[Company Name]
